error.signature: IL2CPP error: Unity.IL2CPP.Building.BuilderFailedException: Attempting to constrain an unconstructed type

verdict.summary: IL2CPP AOT compilation failed. Generic type stripping, reflection usage, or unsupported managed code pattern.

dead_ends.action: Switch to Mono backend to avoid IL2CPP issues
dead_ends.why_fails: Mono is not available on iOS/consoles. IL2CPP is mandatory for most release platforms.
Disabling stripping includes everything, making builds 2-5x larger. Use a link.xml instead.

workarounds.action: Add a link.xml to preserve types stripped by IL2CPP linker
Add dummy references for generic types used via reflection
workarounds.how: private void PreserveTypes() { new List<MyType>(); }  // forces IL2CPP to generate code for this generic

workarounds.action: Update IL2CPP / Unity to latest patch for bug fixes
workarounds.how: Unity Hub > Installs > Check for Updates; IL2CPP bugs are fixed frequently in patch releases
